title: FPP pluginList.json
description: The master index of community plugins shown in FPP's Plugin Manager.

pluginList.description: One entry per plugin: [displayName, pluginInfoURL] or [displayName, pluginInfoURL, category].

items.description: A positional tuple. Element 2 (category) is optional and backward-compatible.

prefixItems.description: Display/repo name (used as the entry key).
Raw URL to the plugin's pluginInfo.json. Must be hosted on GitHub — that's the only source FPP plugins support.
Category short name (must exist in pluginCategories.json).
